data.title: Top Wall Street Forecasters Revamp Keurig Dr Pepper Expectations Ahead Of Q1 Earnings
data.description: Keurig Dr Pepper Inc. (NASDAQ: KDP) is set to announce its first-quarter earnings on Thursday, April 23, before the market opens. Analysts are predicting earnings of 37 cents per share for the Texas-based company, a decrease from 42 cents per share in the same period last year. The consensus estimate for quarterly revenue stands at $3.83 billion, up from $3.63 billion in the previous year. Keurig Dr Pepper recently extended its strategic partnership with Nestlé USA on April 21. The company's stock saw a 0.4% increase, closing at $26.54 on Wednesday. To access the latest analyst ratings, readers can visit Benzinga's Analyst Stock Ratings page where they can filter results by stock ticker, company name, analyst firm, rating change, and more. For further details, the complete story is available on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Payslip and Deloitte Lead on the acceleration of Global Pay Transparency Demands
data.description: The Pay Transparency Directive from the EU is driving the adoption of centralized global payroll data. Payslip, a Global Payroll Control & AI Technology Company, has reached a notable achievement by automating more than 1.3 million payslips each year for numerous entities.

data.title: MINJUVI® (tafasitamab) for Relapsed or Refractory Follicular Lymphoma Approved in Australia
data.description: The new treatment Minjuvi® (tafasitamab) has been approved in Australia as a chemotherapy-free option for adults with relapsed or refractory follicular lymphoma (R/R FL) (Grade 1-3a). This treatment involves a combination of Minjuvi®, rituximab, and lenalidomide. It is the first and only dual-targeted immunotherapy regimen targeting CD19 and CD20 to receive approval in Australia for this condition.

data.title: SkylineDx to Present Data on Precision Molecular Diagnostics Advances in Cutaneous Squamous Cell Carcinoma at 22nd EADO Congress
data.description: A recent study has unveiled a novel gene-signature for cutaneous squamous cell carcinoma (CSCC) that can effectively pinpoint a subgroup of patients with an escalated risk of metastasis development. This groundbreaking signature surpasses the performance of current staging methods. The research was conducted in Rotterdam, Netherlands, and San Diego. The findings, announced on April 23, 2026, signify a significant advancement in CSCC treatment and prognosis, potentially improving outcomes for identified high-risk individuals.

data.title: 2026 ASCO | Mabwell to Present Latest Clinical Data on 9MW2821 Combined with Toripalimab for Urothelial Carcinoma in Oral and Poster Presentations
data.description: On April 23, 2026, based in Shanghai, Mabwell (688062.SH), a biopharmaceutical company focusing on innovation, revealed two recent clinical study outcomes regarding its Nectin-4-targeting ADC 9MW2821 when combined with toripalimab for treating urothelial conditions. This news showcases the company's commitment to advancing in the biopharmaceutical sector.

data.title: Elon Musk Says Optimus V3 Unveil To Be Closer To Robot's Production As Rivals 'Copy' Everything Tesla Does
data.description: During an earnings call, Tesla's CEO Elon Musk accused rivals in the Humanoid Robot industry of copying their robotics technology through frame-by-frame analysis. Musk revealed that competitors are imitating every aspect of their advancements. He mentioned plans to unveil the next generation of Optimus robots, potentially around July-August, and expressed a strategy of keeping new technology concealed until it nears production stages. This move aims to avoid giving competitors a head start. Musk underscored the importance of protecting their innovations from being replicated before they are ready for market release.

data.title: American Airlines Gears Up For Q1 Print; Here Are The Recent Forecast Changes From Wall Street's Most Accurate Analysts
data.description: Before the opening bell on Thursday, April 23, American Airlines Group Inc. (NASDAQ: AAL) will be releasing its first quarter earnings report. Analysts are anticipating a quarterly loss of 46 cents per share, an improvement from the 59 cents per share loss reported in the same quarter last year. The consensus estimate for the company's quarterly revenue is $13.75 billion, a growth from the $12.55 billion revenue reported last year. American Airlines Group recently announced the rejection of merger talks with United Airlines. Following this news, the company's shares experienced a 2.3% drop, closing at $11.50 on Wednesday. For more insights and analyst ratings on American Airlines, readers can visit the Analyst Stock Ratings page on Benzinga's platform.

data.title: Dogecoin To Close Higher On Thursday? Here's What Crypto Prediction Market Is Wagering On
data.description: Traders in the cryptocurrency market are uncertain about Dogecoin's performance on Thursday. Polymarket, a platform for trading based on Polygon, gives Dogecoin only a 14% chance of finishing higher by 12:00 p.m. ET on April 23. The outcome will be determined by comparing the closing price of the DOGE/USDT 1-minute Binance candle at 12:00 p.m. ET on April 23 to the closing price at the same time on April 22. If the prices are equal, participants can redeem their shares for a $0.50 payout. As of April 22, the closing price was $0.097970. Participants are closely watching these developments with speculations.

data.title: DUAL-PATHWAY BLOCKADE THERAPY OFFERS HOPE FOR RARE, HARD-TO-TREAT GYNAECOLOGICAL CLEAR CELL CANCERS
data.description: Promising results have been shown in an international study involving pembrolizumab and lenvatinib for recurrent disease, addressing a significant treatment gap. The study conducted in Singapore on April 23, 2026, highlighted the effectiveness of this combination. A patient named Caitlin Delaney, aged 48 at the time of her cancer diagnosis in 2017, benefited from this treatment. This highlights the potential of pembrolizumab plus lenvatinib in addressing longstanding challenges in cancer care. Over the years, this combination has emerged as a beacon of hope for patients facing recurrent disease, showing positive clinical activity.

data.title: Global Wood Pellets Market Outlook 2035: How Drax Group plc, Enviva Inc. & Graanul Invest Are Driving Renewable Energy Growth Across North America, Europe & Asia-Pacific
data.description: In Newark, Delaware on April 23, 2026, a recent market analysis by Future Market Insights indicates significant growth in the global wood pellets market. The industry is thriving as countries worldwide ramp up efforts to shift towards renewable energy sources and carbon-neutral fuels. This uptrend is driven by a growing awareness of environmental concerns and a push for sustainable energy alternatives. The market for wood pellets is witnessing robust expansion as demand escalates, with key players capitalizing on this momentum.

data.title: Hexagon Interim Report 1 January - 31 March 2026
data.description: In the first quarter of 2026, operating net sales from continuing operations in Stockholm reached 963.8 MEUR, showing 8% organic growth. When including acquired deferred revenue, net sales amounted to 963.6 MEUR. Adjusted gross earnings were 606.3 MEUR, a decrease from 619.1 MEUR.
